# Alhaya Cleaning Services

## Services
- Carpet Deep Shampoo Cleaning (signature deep cleaning with 2-4 hour dry time) — /services/carpet-cleaning
- Professional Carpet Stain Removal (coffee, tea, Karak, ink, grease, pet messes) — /services/stain-removal
- Deep Carpet Odor Removing (antimicrobial enzyme-based treatment) — /services/odor-removal
- Specialized Rug Care by Fabric Type (Persian, wool, shaggy, synthetic) — /services/rug-cleaning
- Commercial & Office Carpet Cleaning (flexible after-hours scheduling) — /services/commercial-carpet-cleaning
- Sofa & Upholstery Cleaning (fabric & leather) — /services/sofa-upholstery-cleaning

## Service Areas (all 7 emirates)
- Dubai — /locations/dubai (Marina, Downtown, Jumeirah, Business Bay, Deira, Al Barsha)
- Sharjah — /locations/sharjah (Al Nahda, Al Majaz, Muwaileh, Khor Fakkan)
- Ajman — /locations/ajman (Ajman City, Al Nuaimiya, Al Rashidiya, Al Jurf)
- Abu Dhabi — /locations/abu-dhabi (Khalifa City, Mussafah, Saadiyat, Yas Island)
- Ras Al Khaimah — /locations/ras-al-khaimah (Al Hamra, Mina Al Arab, Al Nakheel)
- Umm Al Quwain — /locations/umm-al-quwain (UAQ City, Al Salamah, Al Raas)
- Fujairah — /locations/fujairah (Dibba, Al Faseel, Khor Fakkan, Kalba)

## Key Facts
- Advanced extraction technology extracts 90% of water instantly
- Rapid 2 to 4 hours dry time — carpets ready to walk on
- Eco-friendly, non-toxic, biodegradable, child-safe and pet-safe products
- Residential and commercial carpet cleaning across all UAE
- Specialized care for Persian, Oriental, wool, shaggy, and synthetic carpets
- Transparent pricing with no hidden charges

## The 2-4 Hour Dry Time Advantage
When looking for the best carpet shampooing services Dubai, business owners and busy families cannot afford to wait days for fabrics to dry. Our heavy-duty industrial machinery extracts 90% of water instantly during the rinse cycle, so your carpets are fully dry, fresh, and ready to walk on in just 2 to 4 hours.
